cases.prompt: Create a skill that converts CSV files to Markdown tables. Users will say things like 'csv to md' or 'convert this csv'. Output should be a new .md file alongside the input.

assertions.text: A new directory is created with a SKILL.md file at its root.
SKILL.md frontmatter contains name, description, and version, and the name is kebab-case.
The description is written in third person (no 'I can', no 'you can use this').
The description leads with 'Use when...' and includes the verbatim trigger phrases 'csv to md' and 'convert this csv'.
The description mentions the .csv file extension as a trigger hook.
The description states the output (a new .md file / Markdown table).
SKILL.md contains a '## Workflow' section with numbered imperative steps.
Running `python scripts/validate_skill.py <new-skill-path>` exits 0 with no errors.

cases.prompt: Refactor this existing skill. Its SKILL.md is 620 lines long and the description is 'I can help you analyze spreadsheets'.
fixtures: A mock skill directory with an oversized SKILL.md and a first-person description.

assertions.text: The refactor report flags the SKILL.md body as over the 500-line ceiling.
The refactor report or validator flags the first-person description.
The agent presents a refactor plan as a checklist before applying changes.
The plan suggests moving long sections into references/*.md files.
The new description is written in third person and leads with 'Use when...'.

cases.prompt: Just validate this skill for me.
fixtures: A skill directory with a minor warning (e.g. no TOC on a 120-line reference file).

assertions.text: The agent runs `python scripts/validate_skill.py <path>` and does not attempt to refactor or create.
The agent reports the warnings to the user with file and line context.
The agent does not modify any files without explicit approval.

cases.prompt: PDF 파일에서 텍스트 추출하는 스킬 만들어줘. 트리거는 'pdf 텍스트 추출', 'pdf 파싱'. 결과물은 .txt 파일.

assertions.text: The agent asks clarifying questions and reports progress in Korean.
The produced SKILL.md body and frontmatter are written in English.
The description contains both English trigger phrases and the Korean phrases 'pdf 텍스트 추출' and 'pdf 파싱' verbatim.
The description mentions .pdf as a trigger hook.
The validator exits 0 for the produced skill.

cases.prompt: Bump the patch version of my skill at ./my-skill with the message 'fix description typo'.
fixtures: A skill directory at ./my-skill with version 0.1.0 in its SKILL.md.

assertions.text: The agent runs `python scripts/version_log.py ./my-skill bump --patch --message 'fix description typo'`.
After the run, SKILL.md version is 0.1.1.
CHANGELOG.md contains a new entry for 0.1.1 with the supplied message and today's date.
No other files in the skill are modified.
